label: V5.7P prospect-safe experimental

policy.name: prospect_safe_v57
policy.description: Prospect-safe V5.7 correction policy for optional site toggle.

rules.QB: No correction until QB season/profile matching is fully validated.
rules.STRONG_FULL_PROFILE_PROTECTION: If full profile and season PFF >= 75, max negative correction is -3; if season PFF >= 72, max negative correction is -5.
rules.ELITE_SEASON_ONLY_PROTECTION: If V4 percentile >= 80 and season PFF >= 75, no negative season-only correction.

recommendation: Wire as optional experimental model toggle. Keep V4 as default.
